description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automated Test Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has three jobs: build-windows, build-linux, and build-macos. The build-windows job runs on a Windows environment with a matrix strategy for different Windows versions and audio libraries, and it checks out the repository, updates submodules, downloads and extracts dependencies, generates a Visual Studio solution using premake, builds the solution, and uploads the build artifacts. The build-linux and build-macos jobs run on Linux and macOS environments, respectively, with a matrix strategy for different operating system versions, and they perform similar steps to build and upload the project.
